base: Wash the papaya before cutting or eating.
Store it in a cool, dry location.
Continue to monitor for visible spoilage.
Allow the papaya to ripen at room temperature.
Keep it away from direct sunlight.
Reassess its colour and firmness after one to three days.
Avoid refrigeration before ripening unless necessary.
Do not attempt to salvage visibly spoiled portions.
